creator: matthias.andree@tu-dortmund.de
text:
I don't like the idea of an ephemeral gcc+java -- sounds like a 
maintenance headache much more than adding ECJ stuff to GCC.  It seems 
that Linux distros are doing the latter anyways, so chances are other 
ports crop up in the future that make the same assumptions as pdftk now.

I don't mind moving pdftk to OpenJDK and possibly JNI if that's within 
reasonable effort, else, unless the ECJ stuff in GCC46 is too much of a 
hassle, I'd say let's just use that (and possibly drop it from older GCC 
versions ASA it gets in Gerald's way).

-- 
Matthias Andree
